name: OpenBuild
fullText:
🦞 OpenClaw Hackathon alert! Build & launch AI Agents in 4hrs, WIN Mac Minis 🖥️

Sat, Mar 14 | 1PM–7PM | Shenzhen
No slides, just pure hands-on coding 🚀

2 fire tracks: OpenClaw (1-click deploy, zero dev exp needed) + GOAT Network (x402 pay + ERC-8004 identity on Bitcoin L2, https://t.co/IPn2xLq1DU
